markdownRemark.html:
Here’s a quick demo I’ve been playing with: https://github.com/dopoto/RemoteBeep

It showcases how to:

  • create a minimal .NET 6 SignalR hub
  • send and receive events using SignalR in Angular
  • manage application state using NGRX and NGRX effects

You can check it out here: https://remotebeepstorage.z6.web.core.windows.net

frontmatter.title: RemoteBeep — a demo using .NET 6, SignalR, Angular 13 and NGRX
